name: UBS SDIC China Val Dis Eq QDII-LOF
summary: UBS SDIC China Val Dis Eq QDII-LOF is a fund that focuses on investing in undervalued Chinese equities through the Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor (QDII) program and is structured as a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund aims to achieve long-term capital appreciation by identifying and investing in companies with strong fundamentals that are trading below their intrinsic value. It is managed by UBS SDIC Fund Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
